subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath manifested Himself through His Most Great Name unto all who are in earth and heaven when His banner was raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی باسمه الابهی علی من فی الارض و السماء اذا نصبت رایه انه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
